meaning: n.海盗,北欧海盗,<口>斯堪的纳维亚人
examples: These buildings offer vital insight into Scandinavia's Viking past.
A young Viking teenager named Hiccup aspires to follow his tribe's tradition of becoming a dragon slayer.
The complex style of the medieval wooden church carvings and the skills used to make them almost certainly to derive from the ancient Viking tradition.
The article 'Dublin's Viking heritage' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
When the Packer relationship ended in divorce, the Viking courtship began and remains in full bloom.
